name: Cranberry Catsup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except sugar in a large pot.
2. Bring to a simmer and cook until the cranberries are soft.
3. Remove from heat and strain through a sieve, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible.
4. Return strained liquid to pot and add brown sugar.
5. Stir frequently and cook slowly until the mixture thickens.
6. Allow to cool before serving or storing in an airtight container.
